translations.Are you sure you want to clear all metad: Are you sure you want to clear all metadata from {count} files? This cannot be undone.

Automatic daily backups of all metadata. You can also create manual backups and restore from any backup.

translations.Configure custom metadata fields that wi: Configure custom metadata fields that will be available for all team folders. These fields help organize and categorize your team folders.
Configurez des champs de métadonnées personnalisés disponibles pour les fichiers des dossiers d'équipe. Ces champs aident à organiser et catégoriser vos fichiers.

translations.No Team folder metadata fields are confi: No Team folder metadata fields are configured for this Team folder. Contact your administrator to set up Team folder metadata fields.
translations.No backups available yet. Backups are cr: No backups available yet. Backups are created automatically every 24 hours, or you can create one manually.

translations.Only lowercase letters (a-z), numbers (0: Uniquement des lettres minuscules (a-z), chiffres (0-9) et tirets bas (_)

translations.Thank you for helping improve MetaVox!: Thank you for helping improve MetaVox!
translations.Thank you! Anonymous usage statistics en: Thank you! Anonymous usage statistics enabled.
translations.These details are sent with your anonymo: Ces informations sont envoyées avec vos statistiques d'utilisation anonymes afin que nous puissions vous contacter si nécessaire. Elles ne sont jamais partagées avec des tiers.
translations.These fields apply to the team folder it: These fields apply to the team folder itself
translations.These fields can be set on individual fi: These fields can be set on individual files
translations.This field is used in {count} team folde: This field is used in {count} team folders. Some changes may be restricted.
translations.This file is not in a team folder. Metad: This file is not in a team folder. Metadata is only available for team folder files.
translations.This metadata applies to the entire Team: This metadata applies to the entire Team folder and can only be edited by administrators in the admin settings.
translations.Upload a JSON file to import metadata fi: Téléversez un fichier JSON pour importer des champs de métadonnées.
translations.Uppercase letters are not allowed — use: Les majuscules ne sont pas autorisées — utilisez uniquement des minuscules
translations.Users in selected groups will be able to: Users in selected groups will be able to manage metadata fields and views
translations.We collect: field counts, team folder co: We collect: field counts, team folder counts, entry counts, version info (MetaVox, Nextcloud, PHP), and basic server configuration. No personal data or file contents are ever shared.
translations.When enabled, users see a \"Generate wit: When enabled, users see a "Generate with AI" button in the metadata sidebar. The AI reads file content and suggests values for metadata fields.
translations.You do not have permission to view or ed: You do not have permission to view or edit metadata for this file.
translations.You don't have access to any team folder: Vous n'avez pas encore accès aux dossiers d'équipe. Contactez votre administrateur si vous avez besoin d'un accès.
translations.Your MetaVox license key is invalid or e: Votre clé de licence MetaVox est invalide ou expirée.
translations.Your installation exceeds the free tier: Votre installation dépasse les limites gratuites.
Votre installation dépasse les limites gratuites. Envisagez une licence VoxCloud pour une utilisation illimitée.
translations.e.g., Department, Project Type, Priority: ex. Département, Type de projet, Priorité
